title: QA Creates Test Automation Strategy
description: The QA role must design a comprehensive test automation strategy.
prompt: Design a test automation strategy for the project. Return JSON: {pyramid_levels: {unit: int, integration: int, e2e: int}, frameworks: {unit: string, integration: string, e2e: string}, ci_cd_integration: string, test_data_strategy: string, maintenance_plan: string}.
